periods.name: Tonight
periods.shortForecast: Mostly Cloudy then Chance Showers And Thunderstorms
periods.detailedForecast: A chance of showers and thunderstorms between 1am and 3am, then showers and thunderstorms likely. Mostly cloudy. Low around 65, with temperatures rising to around 67 overnight. South southeast wind around 2 mph. Chance of precipitation is 70%.
